step_rationale: Transcriptional regulator of lipoprotein metabolism and atherosclerosis risk.
mechanism: KLF14 regulates lipid metabolism and ApoB-lipoprotein processing, modulating substrate for atherogenesis.

references.title: Genome-wide association study validation identifies novel loci for atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease.
